title: Comment from American College of Radiology (ACR), HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: Please see the attached comments from the American College of Radiology (ACR) regarding RIN 0955-AA09, Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity.
